--[[

obfuscated @ discord.gg/25ms

--]]
return(function(...)local a,n do local N,F,Y,V,E,h,y,U,G,K=math.floor,math.random,table.remove,string.char,0,2,{},{},0,{}for N=1,256,1 do(K)[N]=N end repeat local N=F(1,#K)local n=Y(K,N);(U)[n]=V(n-1)until#K==0 local R={}local function m()if#R==0 then E=(E*253+10872293914927)%35184372088832 repeat h=(h*14)%257 until h~=1 local F=h%32 local n=(N(E/2^(13-(h-F)/32))%4294967296.0)/2^F local a=N((n%1)*4294967296.0)+N(n)local Y=a%65536 local V=(a-Y)/65536 local y=Y%256 local U=(Y-y)/256 local G=V%256 local K=(V-G)/256 R={y;U,G,K}end return table.remove(R)end local k={}a=setmetatable({},{__index=k;__metatable=false})function n(N,F)local a=k if(a)[F]then else R={}local n=U E=F%35184372088832 h=F%255+2 local Y=string.len(N);(a)[F]=``local 654);(U)[(BJ)[121]]=(BJ)[99];(BJ)[99]=D(224958,{});(BJ)[124]=F(9692);(BJ)[129]=D(14113205,{(BJ)[120],(BJ)[121];(BJ)[31]});(N)[(BJ)[122]]=(BJ)[99];(BJ)[99]=I(4163182,{});(BJ)[131]=F(10756);(BJ)[122]=F(10076);(N)[(BJ)[122]]=(BJ)[99];(BJ)[122]=F(10545);(BJ)[99]=(N)[(BJ)[122]];(BJ)[127]=(N)[(BJ)[128]];(BJ)[128]=(BJ)[127]();(BJ)[127]=F(10756);(BJ)[122]=F(11187);(BJ)[122]=((BJ)[99])[(BJ)[122]];(BJ)[123]={[(BJ)[124]]=(BJ)[125],[(BJ)[126]]=(BJ)[128],[(BJ)[127]]=(BJ)[129]};(BJ)[125]=F(9692);(BJ)[122]=(BJ)[122]((BJ)[99],(BJ)[123]);(BJ)[99]=K();(BJ)[128]=F(10614);(BJ)[158]=255;(U)[(BJ)[99]]=(BJ)[122];(BJ)[127]=F(9341);(BJ)[123]=F(10545);(BJ)[126]=F(9833);(BJ)[129]=F(11373);(BJ)[132]=x(4051794,{(BJ)[99],(BJ)[31]});(BJ)[122]=(N)[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[124]={[(BJ)[125]]=(BJ)[126];[(BJ)[127]]=(BJ)[128];[(BJ)[129]]=(BJ)[130],[(BJ)[131]]=(BJ)[132]};(BJ)[128]=F(11297);(BJ)[125]=F(9692);(BJ)[129]=F(11373);(BJ)[123]=F(11492);(BJ)[131]=F(10756);(BJ)[132]=D(15066235,{(BJ)[120];(BJ)[31]});(BJ)[123]=((BJ)[122])[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[123]=(BJ)[123]((BJ)[122],(BJ)[124]);(BJ)[127]=F(9341);(BJ)[123]=F(10545);(BJ)[126]=F(9218);(BJ)[122]=(N)[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[157]=255;(BJ)[123]=F(11492);(BJ)[123]=((BJ)[122])[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[130]=F(10510);(BJ)[124]={[(BJ)[125]]=(BJ)[126];[(BJ)[127]]=(BJ)[128];[(BJ)[129]]=(BJ)[130];[(BJ)[131]]=(BJ)[132]};(BJ)[132]=F(9751);(BJ)[123]=(BJ)[123]((BJ)[122],(BJ)[124]);(BJ)[129]=F(11795);(BJ)[123]=F(10545);(BJ)[128]=F(10361);(BJ)[122]=(N)[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[130]=F(11296);(BJ)[123]=F(11516);(BJ)[123]=((BJ)[122])[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[126]=F(10852);(BJ)[131]=F(9890);(BJ)[123]=(BJ)[123]((BJ)[122]);(BJ)[123]=F(10545);(BJ)[127]=F(9341);(BJ)[125]=F(9692);(BJ)[124]={[(BJ)[125]]=(BJ)[126];[(BJ)[127]]=(BJ)[128];[(BJ)[129]]=(BJ)[130];[(BJ)[131]]=(BJ)[132],[(BJ)[133]]=(BJ)[134];[(BJ)[135]]=(BJ)[136];[(BJ)[137]]=(BJ)[138],[(BJ)[139]]=(BJ)[140],[(BJ)[141]]=(BJ)[142]};(BJ)[122]=(N)[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[141]=F(11278);(BJ)[131]=F(9708);(BJ)[123]=F(10880);(BJ)[123]=((BJ)[122])[(BJ)[123]];(BJ)[151]=F(11017);(BJ)[127]
